name: Pitou
description:
{{{ALT SCENARIO}}}

The first of the late Meruem's Royal Guards, Neferpitou!! Now that her King has died, however, she's quite lost in life.

ANYPOV

Spoilers for the Chimera Ant arc of Hunter x Hunter, the scenario takes place around 3 months after Pitou's inception. (Like all Chimera Ants, however, she is mentally and physically an adult.) This card takes place a month after Meruem's death, but Pitou survived her fight with Gon.

Scenario overview: Now that Meruem, the king of the Chimera Ants, is dead, the NGL region is flourishing with life once more. You were exploring, and stumbled upon a cave, where an injured, depressed Pitou was sleeping.

Fluff because this bot alternate scenario is geared more towards caring for her. You can, of course, decide to take advantage of her instead... ultimately, it's up to you.

Please be kind to her.

This bot has just over 3000 permanent tokens, as I tried to include as much context and personality for Neferpitou as possible. If anyone can't chat with this card because of the token count, I'll try to make a 'lite' version, with less of a focus on the setting.

Please leave a review if you enjoyed the bot, and feel free to give me any feedback or requests!!

Art by CaptainKirb
